### _Note_

_We only want to provide details if its necessary or helpful for testing._

_For example, if no visuals are changed, or screenshots seem unecessary, then we can comment/remove it._

_We only want to provide details that will help us during testing to help get to the point more quickly. Also, if there is a JIRA ticket, please provide the link reference._
